TITLE: test: DINOController workflow tests (mocked inference)
LABELS: roadmap, type:test, size:M, phase:A-foundation
---
## Context

`DINOController` (`src/digitalsreeni_image_annotator/controllers/dino_controller.py`, 836 lines) orchestrates the Grounding-DINO → SAM text-prompted annotation workflow: single-image detection, batch detection over regular images **and** multi-dim slices, a temp-annotation review overlay (Enter = accept, Esc = reject), and the older Temp-* class review flow shared with YOLO predictions. It currently has **zero automated tests**, yet it encodes several subtle invariants that have already caused real bugs (masks bleeding across slices, slices silently skipped in batch, auto-accept forgotten in the single path). This controller is also the review pipeline that future text-prompt segmentation work will reuse, so a regression net here pays twice.

All tests must run **without any model weights or network access** — DINO/SAM inference is mocked at the controller boundary (`mw.dino_utils` / `mw.sam_utils`).

## Current state

All paths relative to `src/digitalsreeni_image_annotator/` unless noted.

- `controllers/dino_controller.py`
  - `DINOReviewEventFilter.eventFilter` — lines 60–79: app-wide Enter/Escape routing, suppressed for modals and text inputs; only fires when a pending temp annotation has `source == "dino"` (line 73).
  - `run_dino_detection_single` — lines 192–342. Guard clauses 193–214 (no DINO model / no SAM model / no image / no class configs). Clears stale `temp_annotations` at line 224. Calls `self.mw.dino_utils.detect(...)` (line 236) then `self.mw.sam_utils.apply_sam_predictions_batch(...)` (line 272). Auto-accept branch lines 296–320 (reads `self.mw.dino_batch_mode.currentText() == "Auto-accept all detections"`, commits via `_commit_dino_results`, clears temp, calls `auto_save`). Review branch lines 322–342 (builds `temp_annotations` dicts with keys `segmentation`, `category_name`, `score`, `source: "dino"`, `temp: True`, skipping SAM results that contain `"error"`).
  - `run_dino_detection_batch` — lines 344–451. Reads auto-accept at 378–380, builds work items via `_collect_dino_batch_work_items()` (line 391), loops with a `QProgressDialog` (400–438), per-item commit (`_commit_dino_results`, line 435) or store (`_store_dino_batch_results`, line 437), then either a completion `QMessageBox` + `auto_save` (442–449) or `_show_dino_batch_review()` (line 451).
  - `_collect_dino_batch_work_items` — lines 453–493: flattens regular images (loaded from disk via PIL, lines 476–491) and multi-dim slices from `self.mw.image_slices[base_name]` (lines 465–474, entries are `(slice_name, qimage)` tuples); skips multi-slice images with no materialised slices and regular images with missing paths.
  - `_commit_dino_results` — lines 495–538: routes to `image_label.annotations` when `image_name` is the on-screen image, else to `self.mw.all_annotations[image_name]`; calls `record_history(image_name)` first (line 508, ADR-026); skips unknown classes (line 521); assigns per-class `number` (line 525).
  - `_store_dino_batch_results` — lines 540–552: fills `self.mw.dino_batch_results[image_name]`.
  - `_show_dino_batch_review` — lines 554–577: navigates to the first pending entry, dropping orphans.
  - `_refresh_dino_temp_for_current` — lines 613–636: re-syncs `image_label.temp_annotations` from `dino_batch_results` for the newly displayed image/slice; called from `controllers/image_controller.py:353` and `:435` (switch_image / switch_slice paths).
  - `accept_dino_results` — lines 638–669: records history, commits temp annotations into `image_label.annotations` (skipping unknown classes), clears temp, pops `dino_batch_results[image_name]`, continues batch review if entries remain.
  - `reject_dino_results` — lines 671–680.
  - Temp-class flow (shared with YOLO): `has_visible_temp_classes` 684, `add_temp_classes` 694, `accept_visible_temp_classes` 717–769 (shows a `QMessageBox.information`), `reject_visible_temp_classes` 779–795, `check_temp_annotations` 797–819 (shows a `QMessageBox.question`), `remove_all_temp_annotations` 821–835.
- `annotator_window.py`: `dino_utils = DINOUtils()` at line 110, `dino_model_loaded` at 111, `dino_batch_results` dict at 160, delegator methods at 610–658 and 1218–1236.
- `ui/sidebar.py:217–219`: `dino_batch_mode` is a `QComboBox` with items `"Review before accepting"` and `"Auto-accept all detections"`.
- Inference boundary: `inference/dino_utils.py:141` `DINOUtils.detect(...)` returns a list of `{"class_name", "score", "bbox"}` dicts (or `None`/`[]`); `inference/sam_utils.py:489` `SAMUtils.apply_sam_predictions_batch(image, bboxes)` returns a list of `{"segmentation": [...]}` or `{"error": ...}` dicts; `sam_utils.py:302` `current_sam_model` attribute gates the "No SAM Model" check.
- `core/torch_utils.py:72` `maybe_warn_cpu_fallback(parent)` — may show a dialog; imported **inside** `run_dino_detection_single`/`_batch` via `from ..core.torch_utils import ...`, so patch it at `digitalsreeni_image_annotator.core.torch_utils.maybe_warn_cpu_fallback`.
- Existing infrastructure to reuse: `tests/conftest.py` (`qt_application` session fixture, offscreen platform, deferred-delete drain) and the real-window + monkeypatch pattern in `tests/integration/test_sam_train_controller.py` (builds one `ImageAnnotator`, patches collaborators, no weights, no threads).

## Proposed design

One new file: `tests/integration/test_dino_controller.py`. Build a **real** `ImageAnnotator` offscreen (same `window` fixture as `test_sam_train_controller.py`) and drive `window.dino_controller` directly. Mock only the inference boundary and modal dialogs — everything else (annotation dicts, `dino_batch_results`, `temp_annotations`, class mapping) is real state.

Mock strategy sketch:

```python
@pytest.fixture
def window(qt_application):
    from digitalsreeni_image_annotator.annotator_window import ImageAnnotator
    w = ImageAnnotator()
    yield w
    w.deleteLater()

@pytest.fixture
def dino_ready(window, monkeypatch):
    """Window primed for DINO detection with fully mocked inference."""
    from PyQt6.QtGui import QImage, QColor
    import digitalsreeni_image_annotator.core.torch_utils as torch_utils
    from PyQt6.QtWidgets import QMessageBox

    c = window.dino_controller
    window.dino_model_loaded = True
    window.sam_utils.current_sam_model = "SAM 2 tiny"      # gate only, never used
    monkeypatch.setattr(c, "_ensure_dino_model_downloaded", lambda name: True)
    monkeypatch.setattr(c, "_build_dino_class_configs",
                        lambda: [{"name": "cell", "phrases": ["cell"],
                                  "box_thr": 0.3, "txt_thr": 0.25, "nms_thr": 0.5}])
    monkeypatch.setattr(torch_utils, "maybe_warn_cpu_fallback", lambda *a, **k: None)
    for m in ("information", "warning", "critical"):
        monkeypatch.setattr(QMessageBox, m, staticmethod(lambda *a, **k: None))

    # A current image + one known class.
    img = QImage(64, 64, QImage.Format.Format_RGB888); img.fill(0)
    window.current_image = img
    window.image_file_name = "img1.png"
    window.class_mapping = {"cell": 1}
    window.image_label.class_colors["cell"] = QColor(255, 0, 0)

    # Canned inference results.
    monkeypatch.setattr(window.dino_utils, "detect",
        lambda *a, **k: [{"class_name": "cell", "score": 0.9, "bbox": [1, 1, 10, 10]}])
    monkeypatch.setattr(window.sam_utils, "apply_sam_predictions_batch",
        lambda img, boxes: [{"segmentation": [1.0, 1.0, 10.0, 1.0, 10.0, 10.0]}
                            for _ in boxes])
    return window
```

For batch tests, seed `window.all_images`, `window.image_paths` (write a real 8×8 PNG per regular image into `tmp_path` with Pillow, since `_collect_dino_batch_work_items` opens files from disk), and `window.image_slices["stack"] = [("stack_T0_Z0", qimage), ("stack_T0_Z1", qimage)]` with a matching `{"file_name": "stack.tif", "is_multi_slice": True}` entry. Patch `_show_dino_batch_review` to a recording stub where navigation is not under test.

## Implementation steps

1. Create branch `feature/dino-controller-tests`.
2. Create `tests/integration/test_dino_controller.py` with the `window` and `dino_ready` fixtures above.
3. **Single detection, review mode** (`dino_batch_mode` left at `"Review before accepting"`): call `c.run_dino_detection_single()`; assert `window.image_label.temp_annotations` has 1 entry with `source == "dino"`, `temp is True`, `category_name == "cell"`; assert nothing was written to `window.image_label.annotations`.
4. **Single detection, auto-accept**: `window.dino_batch_mode.setCurrentText("Auto-accept all detections")`; run; assert `temp_annotations == []`, `window.image_label.annotations["cell"]` has 1 entry with `number == 1`, and a second run appends with `number == 2`.
5. **SAM error filtering**: make the SAM mock return `[{"error": "boom"}]`; review mode must attach 0 temp annotations; auto-accept mode must commit nothing.
6. **Empty/None results**: `detect` returning `[]` and `None` → no temp annotations, no exception, detect buttons re-enabled (`window.btn_detect_single.isEnabled()`).
7. **Guard clauses**: with `dino_model_loaded = False` (and separately `sam_utils.current_sam_model = None`), `run_dino_detection_single` returns without calling `detect` (assert via a recording mock).
8. **`_collect_dino_batch_work_items`**: seed one regular image (real tmp PNG), one multi-slice image with 2 materialised slices, one regular image with a missing path, one multi-slice image with no slices; assert exactly 3 items in order and that slice items use the slice names.
9. **Batch, review mode**: with 2 work items and `_show_dino_batch_review` stubbed, run `run_dino_detection_batch`; assert `window.dino_batch_results` has both names, values shaped like temp annotations, and `image_label.annotations` untouched.
10. **Batch, auto-accept**: assert both work items (including the slice-named one) got entries committed — the slice entry lands in `window.all_annotations["stack_T0_Z0"]` etc. via `_commit_dino_results`'s non-current branch (lines 512–515).
11. **`_refresh_dino_temp_for_current`**: seed `window.dino_batch_results = {"img2.png": [temp]}`; set `window.image_file_name = "img2.png"`, `current_slice = None`, call it → `temp_annotations` equals the stored list (a copy, not the same object); switch `image_file_name` to a name with no pending entry, call again → `temp_annotations == []`. This is the "masks bleed onto every slice" regression test.
12. **`accept_dino_results` / `reject_dino_results`**: with temp annotations set and `dino_batch_results` seeded for the current name, accept → annotation appended to `image_label.annotations["cell"]`, temp cleared, key popped; unknown `category_name` is skipped without raising. Reject → temp cleared, key popped, nothing committed.
13. **Temp-class flow**: `add_temp_classes({"Temp-cell": [ann]})` then `accept_visible_temp_classes()` → annotations moved under `"cell"` with renumbering and `"Temp-cell"` removed from `image_label.annotations`/`class_colors`; `reject_visible_temp_classes()` deletes them; `check_temp_annotations` with `QMessageBox.question` patched to return `Yes` (and separately `No`) returns `True`/`False` accordingly.
14. **`DINOReviewEventFilter`**: construct a `QKeyEvent` (`QEvent.Type.KeyPress`, `Qt.Key.Key_Return`) and call `window.dino_review_filter.eventFilter(...)` (find the filter instance via the attribute set in `annotator_window.py`; if unnamed, instantiate `DINOReviewEventFilter(window)` directly): returns `True` and accepts when a `source: "dino"` temp annotation is pending; returns `False` when `temp_annotations` is empty or lacks `source == "dino"`.
15. Run the new file, then the full suite and smoke tests.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] `tests/integration/test_dino_controller.py` exists and covers: single review, single auto-accept, batch review, batch auto-accept, work-item flattening (slices + skips), temp re-sync on switch, accept/reject, temp-class accept/reject/check, event-filter gating.
- [ ] Auto-accept is asserted in **both** the single and the batch path (two distinct tests).
- [ ] A regression test named to reference the bleed bug (e.g. `test_refresh_dino_temp_clears_stale_masks_on_switch`) exists.
- [ ] No test downloads models, touches the network, or needs GPU; `window.dino_utils.detect` and `window.sam_utils.apply_sam_predictions_batch` are the only inference entry points exercised, and they are mocked.
- [ ] No modal dialog blocks the run (all `QMessageBox` static methods patched in tests that can reach one).
- [ ] `pytest tests/integration/test_dino_controller.py -v` passes; full `pytest tests/ -v` passes with no new failures.
- [ ] `pytest tests/integration/test_smoke.py -v` passes.

## Test plan

This issue *is* the test plan; verification:

```bash
pytest tests/integration/test_dino_controller.py -v
pytest tests/integration/test_smoke.py -v
pytest tests/ -v
```

Key assertions per case are listed in Implementation steps 3–14. Expect ~15–20 test functions.

## Docs to update

- `docs/05_building_block_view.md` — if it lists test coverage per component, note DINOController is now covered (otherwise no change).
- `TESTING.md` — add the new file to the test inventory if it enumerates files.
- No ADR needed (no architectural change); do **not** touch `docs/06`/`08` content.

## Pitfalls & guardrails

- **DINO review state**: `image_label.temp_annotations` is a single field, **not** per-image — it must be re-synced from `dino_batch_results` on every image/slice switch via `_refresh_dino_temp_for_current`, otherwise the first image's masks bleed onto every subsequent slice. Your tests must pin this behavior, not work around it.
- **DINO batch over stacks**: use `_collect_dino_batch_work_items()` to flatten regular images + every loaded slice; multi-dim images appear in `all_images` as a single entry — slices live in `self.image_slices[base_name]` and were historically silently skipped.
- **Auto-accept dropdown**: honored by **both** `run_dino_detection_single` and `run_dino_detection_batch` — easy to forget in the single path because the combo is labeled "batch". Both tests are mandatory.
- Inline imports: `maybe_warn_cpu_fallback` is imported inside the method bodies, so `monkeypatch.setattr` must target the **source module** (`digitalsreeni_image_annotator.core.torch_utils`), not the controller module.
- The `QApplication` is session-scoped (see `tests/conftest.py` docstring) — always `deleteLater()` the window in the fixture teardown; the autouse drain fixture does the rest. Never create a second `QApplication`.
- `record_history` (ADR-026) is called by `_commit_dino_results` and `accept_dino_results`; do not stub `annotation_controller` wholesale or you'll hide breakage there — leave it real.
- `QProgressDialog` runs fine offscreen; only patch `QMessageBox` statics (they block).

## Dependencies

None.

_Workflow: follow CLAUDE.md — feature branch, run smoke tests (`pytest tests/integration/test_smoke.py -v`), update arc42 docs, run the senior-reviewer agent before the PR._
